name: ateam
description: AgenTeam: Role-based team collaboration for AI-assisted development. Provides architect, implementer, reviewer, and test-writer roles materialized as Codex-native custom agents.

interface.shortDescription: Role-based team collaboration -- architect, implement, test, review.
interface.longDescription: AgenTeam organizes AI-assisted development into specialist roles (architect, implementer, test-writer, reviewer) materialized as Codex-native custom agents. Configure pipelines, write policies, and custom roles via agenteam.yaml.
defaultPrompt: Set up a development team for this project
Run the full pipeline on: add user authentication
Dispatch the reviewer to check recent changes
